mapper.select: SELECT REPLY_ID, BOARD_ID, REPLY_CONTENT, REPLY_WRITER, CREATED_AT FROM REPLY WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} ORDER BY REPLY_ID ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REPLY ( REPLY_ID, BOARD_ID, REPLY_CONTENT, REPLY_WRITER, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( REPLY_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{boardId}, #{replyContent}, #{replyWriter}, SYSDATE )
